sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto 2010 (1984) as a thriller theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The thriller and science fiction blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Armageddon
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If 2010 clicked for you, Armageddon (1998) is a strong next stop: both trade in thriller and science fiction, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after 2010?
faq.answer: Try Armageddon, Star Trek II: The Wrath of Khan, Star Trek: First Contact—each shares DNA with 2010 while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is 2010?
faq.answer: 2010 (1984) is best described as Thriller, Science Fiction. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is 2010 part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "The Space Odyssey Series" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
